'''Isko Talgal''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] warrior who lived prior to and during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]]. Talgal was a grim-faced woman with [[Color/Legends|graying]] black hair. She was present at a meeting between [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] and several other Mandalorians in [[Zerria's Bar]] on [[Drall (planet)|Drall]] in [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]]. She would later accompany Fett and several other Mandalorians when Fett was hired as backup by [[Natasi Daala]] during the [[Second Battle of Fondor]].
